questions.question: What is a commission in the context of a Database Management System, and how does it relate to data processing?
questions.hint: Define commission and its role in data processing

questions.question: An employee earns a base salary of $5000 per month plus a commission of 10% of their monthly sales. If their monthly sales are $20000, what is their total monthly earnings?
questions.hint: Calculate the commission and add it to the base salary

questions.question: Describe the advantages and disadvantages of using a commission-based payment system in a Database Management System.
questions.hint: Discuss the pros and cons of commission-based payment systems
